comparability_status.reason: No per-item pricing, conflicting total (₹2.4 Cr vs ~₹2.6 Cr), no tax treatment, and zero kids-advertising compliance response. Too many commercial and compliance gaps to compare fairly on price or compliance.

Strongest on pricing structure and compliance, but cannot deliver TVC production at all and mixes USD and INR so the total is unreconciled. Comparable on media and compliance dimensions, not on full-scope cost.

Covers all items and states payment terms and timeline clearly, but withholds a firm total and is vague on compliance and several scopes. Comparable on timeline and coverage breadth, not on firm cost or compliance rigour.

per_vendor.assessment: Covers 6/8 items; declines both paid media items.
per_vendor.basis: line_item_coverage shows paid media planning and buying as 'no'.

per_vendor.assessment: Covers 7/8; explicitly cannot do TVC production.
per_vendor.basis: TVC production marked 'no' with explicit evidence.
social, paid buying, and compliance marked 'partial' with unclear scope notes.

per_vendor.assessment: Lump-sum only, no breakdown, conflicting total.
Clean per-item rate card, but currency conflict and % media obscures absolute cost.
per_vendor.basis: prices 'present' but currency 'conflicting' and media buying 'unclear'.

per_vendor.assessment: Only indicative partial figures; no firm total.

dimension_matrix.note_if_not_comparable: No two vendors present a firm, like-for-like total in a single currency. Direct price comparison is not yet possible without clarifications.

per_vendor.assessment: Weakest: no tax, no payment terms, no per-item pricing.
Tax stated (GST extra); payment terms missing.
Payment terms and exclusions clear; tax missing.
Vague — 'roughly one quarter, give or take'.
No compliance response at all — material gap.
Strongest — specific ASCI process, per-asset log, sign-off, named owner.
Vague assurance only; no ASCI process.
High — commercial opacity + compliance silence on a kids product.
Medium — delivery gap (no production) + 48h approval dependency.
per_vendor.basis: missing TVC production + 48h assumption risk flag.

per_vendor.assessment: Medium-high — unsupported reach guarantee + no firm price.

key_differences: Only MediaMetric gives a real per-item rate card; Brightwave is lump-sum and Launchpad defers its quote — so price is the least comparable dimension today.
Compliance splits sharply: MediaMetric is specific and ASCI-anchored, Launchpad is vague, and Brightwave is silent — a critical gap for a kids' product.
Delivery completeness differs: Launchpad covers all 8 items, Brightwave drops paid media, and MediaMetric cannot do TVC production at all.
Timeline confidence is inverted vs price clarity: Launchpad has the best timeline but the worst price commitment.

missing_info_blocking_comparison.missing: Per-item pricing, a single reconciled total, tax treatment, and any compliance response.
missing_info_blocking_comparison.why_it_matters: Without these, neither cost nor compliance can be scored against the RFQ's weighted criteria.

missing_info_blocking_comparison.missing: A single-currency total and a TVC production solution/partner.
missing_info_blocking_comparison.why_it_matters: Buyer cannot compute true cost or rely on MediaMetric for full launch delivery.

missing_info_blocking_comparison.missing: A firm total and a concrete compliance process.
missing_info_blocking_comparison.why_it_matters: Indicative ranges and vague compliance can't be evaluated against weighted criteria.

buyer_attention: Do not rank on price yet — no two vendors are quoting like-for-like in the same currency or basis.
Compliance is a weighted, mandatory dimension for a kids' product: Brightwave's silence and Launchpad's vagueness are higher-priority risks than headline price.
MediaMetric's missing TVC production means it can only win as part of a consortium — factor in a production partner's cost before comparing its total.
Treat Launchpad's '10M+ organic reach' guarantee with caution; it is unsupported and may not survive due diligence.

clarification_questions.question: Please provide a per-line-item price breakdown, confirm a single all-in total (₹2.4 Cr vs ₹2.6 Cr), and state whether GST is included.
How will you handle ASCI kids-advertising and FSSAI claims compliance, including documented sign-off?
Please restate the full quote in a single currency (INR) and confirm how TVC production would be sourced and priced.
Please provide a project timeline with milestones from appointment to go-live.
Please provide a firm, itemised total with GST clarity rather than indicative ranges.
Please substantiate the '10M+ organic reach' guarantee with methodology, and detail your ASCI compliance process.
